name: app-money-management
description: Electron + React personal money management app
author: Frost

scripts.move:exe: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const release=path.join(root,'release');if(!fs.existsSync(release)) process.exit(0);for(const name of ['AMM-Setup.exe','AMM-x64.exe','AMM-ia32.exe']){const target=path.join(root,name);if(fs.existsSync(target)) fs.rmSync(target,{force:true});}const installer=fs.readdirSync(release).find((name)=>/^AMM-Setup-.*\.exe$/i.test(name));if(installer){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(release,installer),path.join(root,'AMM-Setup.exe'));console.log('Copied release/'+installer+' -> AMM-Setup.exe');}console.log('Portable app folders are available in release/win-unpacked and release/win-ia32-unpacked');"
scripts.dist:win: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --x64 && npm run move:exe
scripts.dist:win32: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --ia32 && npm run move:exe
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run react:build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis --x64 --ia32 && npm run move:exe
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:win:all && echo macOS release files are built in GitHub Actions or on a macOS machine with npm run dist:mac:all
